title: Improve accessibility for HvA project website
summary: Student wants to ship an HvA portfolio site that meets WCAG 2.1 AA and gathers user feedback from a demo with peers and a coach.
text: As a student I want to learn how to audit and improve web accessibility so that the HvA portfolio site is usable for screen-reader users. Context: HBO-ICT semester project; stakeholders are the course coach and project partner. Goals: run axe and Lighthouse audits, fix color contrast and keyboard traps, and validate with one screen-reader test. Approach: study WCAG quickstart from HvA knowledge base, compare with WAI tutorials, implement fixes in React, and run a peer review. Evidence: before/after audit scores, list of fixed issues, notes from the screen-reader session, and a short reflection on next steps.

title: Secure API for HvA learning diary
summary: Student needs to design authentication and testing for a learning-diary API, using HvA security guidelines and external references.
text: As a student I want to learn how to secure an API for the HvA learning diary so that student reflections remain private. Context: minor project; stakeholders are classmates and product owner. Goals: implement token-based authentication, add input validation, and document threat mitigations. Approach: read HvA security checklist, compare with OWASP API Top 10, build a FastAPI prototype with JWT, write 3 PyTest cases for auth and validation, and run one code review with a peer. Evidence: API spec, test results, checklist mapping, and a short reflection on remaining risks.

title: ML model bias onderzoek (HvA)
summary: Student onderzoekt bias in een eenvoudig ML-model en koppelt bevindingen aan HvA-ethiekrichtlijnen.
text: Als student wil ik leren hoe ik bias in een bestaand classificatiemodel kan herkennen en verminderen zodat ik verantwoord kan deployen binnen de HvA-omgeving. Context: labopdracht; stakeholders zijn docent data science en medestudenten. Leerdoelen: dataset-bias analyseren, mitigaties testen (rebalancing, thresholding) en resultaten uitleggen aan niet-technische stakeholders. Aanpak: lees HvA-ethiekrichtlijnen en ACM code, voer exploratory data analysis uit, pas een rebalancing-techniek toe, vergelijk metric-verschillen per groep en vraag feedback van een docent. Bewijs: notebook met grafieken, metric-tabel voor/na, bronverwijzingen en een reflectie op beperkingen.
